description: Determines the properties of the creature's targeted attack.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the properties of the creature's targeted attack.

entries.description: The ability effects a common target (for instance, human beings).

descriptionTranslations.en: The ability effects a common target (for instance, human beings).

entries.description: The ability effects a less common target (only cats).

descriptionTranslations.en: The ability effects a less common target (only cats).

entries.description: The ability effects a rare target (dragons, for instance).

descriptionTranslations.en: The ability effects a rare target (dragons, for instance).

entries.description: The ability does physical damage to the target.

descriptionTranslations.en: The ability does physical damage to the target.

entries.description: The ability does something other than damage, such as stunning the target.

descriptionTranslations.en: The ability does something other than damage, such as stunning the target.

entries.description: Roll twice on this table. If you get a duplicate result, ignore it and roll again. If you get a contradictory result, take the two results and use the one that seems most appropriate.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll twice on this table. If you get a duplicate result, ignore it and roll again. If you get a contradictory result, take the two results and use the one that seems most appropriate.
